subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Be thou assured that the Blessed Beauty is well-pleased with thee, and Abdul-Baha too is in the utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مطمئن باش جمال مبارک از تو راضی و عبدالبهاء در نهایت رضا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
